mentions.note: Cancer franchise turned out stronger than expected; superior portfolio vs. AbbVie; hold position for continued upside.
Cancer franchise turned out to be lot stronger than thought; hold position; better portfolio than Abby at this moment despite higher yield on competitor.
Drugstore all working; group performing well.

Largest NYSE transfer in 234 years; up 30% over 12 months on track for $80B revenue target by 2030. Diversified pipeline: oncology leadership (breast/lung cancer), hypertension drug, GLP-1 obesity pill in phase 2B, plus $50B US manufacturing commitment and AI-driven drug discovery.
